title: Implement guard.Evaluate() and guard.Packs() with integration tests
description: Implement guard/guard.go with Evaluate (sync.Once pipeline init, option processing, nil-policy guard) and Packs. Full unit test suite (empty, whitespace, safe, destructive, policy variants, allowlist, blocklist, concurrent safety). Integration tests (git push force, rm-rf, compound, env escalation, pack selection, golden file corpus).
